home.titleGuest: Planning, stock, and execution in one calmer surface.
home.descriptionAuth: Jump into the next production step, review inventory pressure, and keep BOM changes moving in one focused workspace.
home.descriptionGuest: Craftify gives growing manufacturing teams one structured system for items, BOMs, inventory, and work requests.
home.focusDescription: Shared primitives live below the route layer, so new features can ship without cloning layout, typography, and action patterns.
home.featuresTitle: A frontend shape that scales by feature, not by page sprawl.
home.featuresDescription: Atomic UI primitives keep consistency. Feature modules own behavior. Routes only compose the experience.
home.featureInventoryDescription: Drive stock visibility through one extendable pattern for filters, actions, imports, and detail forms.
home.featureBomDescription: Keep product structure editing, revision context, and downstream work requests close to the domain.
home.featureWorkDescription: Expose status, calendar actions, and completion flows through reusable feature modules.

legal.termsDescription: These are placeholder terms. Replace them with your actual terms of service.
legal.privacyDescription: This is a placeholder privacy policy. Replace it with your real policy.
legal.privacyDetails: We explain what data we collect, how we use it, and what choices you have.

erp.searchPlaceholder: Search modules, orders, inventory, and settings
erp.defaultDescription: A shared operational shell for restaurant and production workflows.
erp.placeholderSectionDescription: This route now follows the shared ERP shell and can be expanded incrementally with mock services and reusable patterns.
erp.nextSliceTitle: Build the operational workflow, not just the page chrome.
erp.nextSliceDescription: Start with realistic mock data, shared list and card patterns, and page-level actions before connecting incomplete APIs.

settings.profileDesc: Поддържайте идентичността на оператора, поведението при вход и свързаните с акаунта настройки последователни в цялата работна среда.
settings.notificationsDesc: Подгответе предпочитания за сигнали и напомняния при кухненски събития, проблеми с доставки и последващи действия по снабдяване.
settings.locationsDesc: Разширете тази зона с настройки за обекти, станции и складови места, когато оперативният модел на данните се развие.
settings.localizationDesc: Управлявайте езика, форматите и регионалното представяне за ежедневната работа на всички устройства.

kpi.ordersDetail: Dining room and delivery orders currently tracked across the service window.
kpi.tablesDetail: Tables currently seated or turning and likely to affect kitchen pacing.
kpi.deliveriesDetail: Drivers and inbound ingredient routes that still require monitoring.
kpi.stockDetail: Ingredients close to replenishment thresholds or already blocking service.
kpi.revenueDetail: Current service-day estimate across dine-in, pickup, and delivery.
kpi.queueDetail: Tickets, batches, and prep tasks waiting for completion or escalation.

quickAction.newOrderDesc: Review active orders and service timing by channel.
quickAction.stockCheckDesc: Review low-stock ingredients and replenishment needs.
quickAction.startBatchDesc: Jump into active work items and kitchen prep tasks.
quickAction.dispatchDesc: Open delivery coordination for customer and ingredient runs.

dashboard.pageDescription: Track the current pulse of service, stock, kitchen pressure, and delivery flow.
dashboard.title: A calmer operational picture for the entire workspace.
dashboard.description: This dashboard combines dining room, kitchen, stock, and delivery signals into one mobile-friendly view that can grow with future ERP modules.

orders.pageDescription: Track dining room, pickup, and delivery demand from one queue.
orders.title: Prepare the order module around service speed and visibility.
orders.description: The next implementation step should combine table orders, online channels, and fulfillment states without fragmenting the workflow across multiple disconnected screens.

one.title: Unified order inbox
one.description: Merge dine-in, pickup, delivery, and catering into one filterable queue.

two.title: Actionable status tracking
two.description: Highlight prep, ready, delayed, and completed states with clear next actions.

three.title: Guest and channel context
three.description: Show table, customer, channel, ETA, and item count in the first scan line.

four.title: Responsive execution
four.description: Keep the mobile view usable during active service without horizontal scrolling.

production.pageDescription: Coordinate prep queues, batches, and production capacity.
production.title: Use the production module as the bridge between BOMs and live kitchen work.
production.description: This section should eventually connect recipes, prep batches, and work items so operators can see capacity, blockers, and next steps from one place.

one.title: Prep queue visibility
one.description: Surface urgent batches, blocked tickets, and in-progress production clearly.

two.title: Station-aware layout
two.description: Keep kitchen stations, output targets, and required ingredients easy to compare.

three.title: BOM-to-batch continuity
three.description: Reuse BOM and work item data instead of duplicating production logic.

four.title: Touch-friendly controls
four.description: Operators should be able to update state quickly on smaller devices.

inventory.pageDescription: Manage ingredients, stock movements, and replenishment signals.

procurement.pageDescription: Coordinate supplier orders, receiving, and replenishment planning.
procurement.title: Build procurement around lead time, stock pressure, and receiving confidence.
procurement.description: Supplier workflows should connect directly to low-stock triggers, purchase requests, and inbound delivery expectations without creating parallel data models.

one.title: Supplier-focused planning
one.description: Compare demand, lead time, and minimum order constraints in one place.

two.title: Receiving-ready details
two.description: Track expected arrivals, dock notes, and quality checks cleanly.

three.title: Replaceable mock services
three.description: Start with realistic purchase requests and supplier fixtures before API integration.

four.title: Shared inventory language
four.description: Reuse units, locations, and item references already present in the inventory and items flows.

deliveries.pageDescription: Track driver routes, dispatch timing, and ingredient logistics.
deliveries.title: Plan delivery workflows for both customer orders and inbound ingredient runs.
deliveries.description: The route structure is now ready for route boards, ETA tracking, and issue reporting without forcing a second navigation system.

one.title: Dispatch board
one.description: Keep routes, drivers, ETAs, and exceptions visible together.

two.title: Inbound and outbound coverage
two.description: Support both customer deliveries and ingredient logistics inside one domain.

three.title: Delay reporting
three.description: Make route blockers and late arrivals obvious and actionable.

four.title: Operational summaries
four.description: Use cards first, then expand into denser tables on wider screens.

tables.pageDescription: Manage seating, reservations, and front-of-house floor status.
tables.title: Use this section for host stand and dining room visibility.
tables.description: Table state, reservations, seating turnover, and order linkage should stay simple enough for service teams to scan instantly during busy shifts.

one.title: Visual floor status
one.description: Show seated, reserved, turning, and available states clearly.

two.title: Reservation context
two.description: Keep booking time, party size, and special notes near the table state.

three.title: Fast reassignment
three.description: Mobile-friendly controls should support quick updates during service.

four.title: Order connection
four.description: Link table state back to active orders without duplicating guest workflow data.

menu.pageDescription: Manage dishes, pricing, availability, and ingredient relationships.
menu.title: Treat menu configuration as an operational module, not static content.
menu.description: Dishes, prep dependencies, availability windows, and cost impact should fit naturally alongside item and inventory management.

one.title: Dish-to-ingredient mapping
one.description: Keep menu items close to their ingredient and production dependencies.

two.title: Availability awareness
two.description: Reflect stock pressure and production limits in availability decisions.

three.title: Channel-specific presentation
three.description: Leave room for dine-in, delivery, and seasonal variations later.

four.title: Replaceable pricing mocks
four.description: Use realistic sample dishes and pricing rules until backend coverage is ready.

reports.pageDescription: Review performance, waste, cost, and service trends without leaving the ERP shell.
reports.title: Reporting should grow from operational patterns already present in the dashboard.
reports.description: The initial route should stay lightweight while chart, export, and filter conventions are normalized across the product.

one.title: Shared KPI language
one.description: Reuse dashboard metrics and status definitions for report summaries.

two.title: Scalable filters
two.description: Build date, location, and channel filters once and reuse them.

three.title: Export-aware design
three.description: Prepare report sections that can later support print and CSV export cleanly.

four.title: Small-screen readability
four.description: Summary cards and simplified charts should remain useful on mobile.

settings.pageDescription: Control localization, defaults, workspace setup, and operator preferences.
settings.title: Settings foundation
settings.description: This area anchors workspace configuration so setup and ongoing preferences can expand without spreading settings across unrelated pages.
settings.languageHelp: Изберете езика по подразбиране за защитената работна среда.
settings.themeHelp: Задайте визуалната тема, която операторите да виждат след вход.

wizard.pageDescription: Водете новата работна среда през предпочитанията, които трябва да се зададат при първи вход.
wizard.title: Задайте предпочитанията преди да влезете в операциите.
wizard.description: Този помощник събира наличните в настройките потребителски предпочитания и ги записва за текущия профил.
wizard.saveError: Не успяхме да завършим настройката. Опитайте отново.

locale.title: Изберете език
locale.description: Задайте езика, който операторите да използват в работната среда.
locale.help: Той се записва като стандартен за текущия профил и може да се променя по-късно от настройките.
locale.fieldHelp: Използвайте езика, който трябва да се отваря по подразбиране след вход.

theme.title: Изберете тема
theme.description: Изберете визуалната тема по подразбиране за работната среда.
theme.help: Записаната тема се прилага веднага и остава редактирана от настройките.
theme.fieldHelp: Използвайте темата, която трябва да се възстановява при следващи влизания.

review.title: Review setup
review.description: Confirm the defaults before entering the dashboard.
review.help: Това резюме потвърждава текущите предпочитания преди приключване на въвеждането.

items.pageDescription: Maintain products, ingredients, and stock-linked master data.

boms.pageDescription: Manage bill of materials and production structure details.

workItems.pageDescription: Track production requests, status transitions, and completion.

calendar.pageDescription: Coordinate time-based production and operational events.
